title: strategy_006_donchian_breakout_obv_confirmation
thesis_bullets: STRATEGY: Donchian Channel Breakout with OBV Volume Confirmation ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 4h MARKET CONDITION: Breakout/expansion after consolidation TYPE: Breakout/momentum CONCEPT: Classic turtle trading breakout adapted for crypto.
Price breaking the 20-period Donchian high/low signals a potential new trend.
OBV confirmation ensures the breakout has real volume behind it, filtering fake breakouts.
ADX rising confirms momentum is building.
Exit uses a shorter 10-period Donchian to capture the meat of the move without giving back too much.

INDICATORS USED: - Donchian Channels (period 20) - breakout entry signal - Donchian Channels (period 10) - exit signal (shorter period) - OBV - volume confirmation (OBV must be above its own 20-period SMA) - ADX (period 14) - rising ADX confirms building momentum - ATR (period 14) - position sizing and initial stop ENTRY LONG: 1.
Price closes above 20-period Donchian Channel high (new 20-bar high) 2.
OBV > SMA(OBV, 20) (volume is supporting the move) 3.
ADX is rising (current ADX > ADX from 3 bars ago) ENTRY SHORT: 1.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 4h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 4h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
